title: Resolution record
description: The outcome and score for one (method, model, horizon) at one origin, appended when the horizon resolves. Append-only.

origin_date.description: Origin of the prediction being resolved (join key to the prediction record).

method.description: Per-rung method identifier (schema 1.1.0: one enum value per deployed rung; adaptive_* are forward declarations for the stage-2c twins).

forecast_date.description: Trading day the horizon resolved on (origin + horizon business days).

realized_value.description: Realized cumulative log return from origin close to forecast_date close.

crps.description: Continuous Ranked Probability Score of the predictive distribution against realized_value (lower is better).

resolved_at.description: Wall-clock time the scoring job appended this resolution.
